name: Czechoslovakia Pastry Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until fluffy.
2. Beat in the eggs and vanilla extract, mixing well.
3. Mix together the salt and 3/4 of the flour.
4. Spread 3/4 of the batter into a greased 11x17 jelly roll pan.
5. Spread with preserves or jam, then sprinkle nuts over all.
6. Combine the remaining flour with the chopped walnuts.
7. Sprinkle this mixture over the top of the bars.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 35 minutes.
9. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
